nodes.name: YouTube Webhook (PubSubHubbub)
nodes.notes:
Subscribe at: https://pubsubhubbub.appspot.com/subscribe
Hub URL: https://pubsubhubbub.appspot.com/
Topic: https://www.youtube.com/xml/feeds/videos.xml?channel_id=YOUR_CHANNEL_ID

meta.description: Receives YouTube PubSubHubbub webhook when video is uploaded, fetches full details via YouTube Data API, then simultaneously posts to Twitter/X, notifies Slack team, and publishes on Instagram (2-step media create → publish).
prerequisites: YouTube Data API v3 OAuth2 credentials
Instagram Business Account with Graph API access token
Set env variables: YOUTUBE_CHANNEL_ID, INSTAGRAM_BUSINESS_ID, INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN
Instagram thumbnail must be publicly accessible URL

testingScenario.happy_path: Upload private YouTube video → verify all 3 platforms notified within 30 seconds
testingScenario.test_manually: POST fake PubSubHubbub XML to webhook: <?xml version='1.0'?><feed xmlns:yt='http://www.youtube.com/xml/schemas/2015'><entry><yt:videoId>dQw4w9WgXcQ</yt:videoId><title>Test Video</title><published>2026-06-13T09:00:00Z</published><yt:channelId>UCxxxxxx</yt:channelId></entry></feed>
